Is Bitcoin About To Trend Higher? Analytics Firm Santiment Says BTC Bullish Metric Flashing Green
articles.description: Blockchain analytics platform Santiment says a key metric is flashing bullish for Bitcoin (BTC) as it did in November 2022. Santiment says that the level of fear in the digital assets space, based on trending crypto terms, is similar to the time after the FTX collapse last year, which proved to be a market bottom […]
